nodes.label: Measuring Length
nodes.description: Understanding units of length, conversions, estimation, and word problems

nodes.label: Units of Length
nodes.description: cm, m, and km — choosing the right unit for the right measurement

nodes.label: Centimetre (cm)
nodes.description: For small objects: pencil, eraser, book

nodes.label: Metre (m)
nodes.description: For medium lengths: room, tree, height of a person

nodes.label: Kilometre (km)
nodes.description: For long distances: between cities, roads, journeys

nodes.label: Converting Units
nodes.description: Changing between cm, m, and km using multiplication and division

nodes.label: Estimating Length
nodes.description: Making a good guess using body parts and known objects

nodes.label: Body Measurements
nodes.description: Hand span (~15 cm), arm length (~50 cm), step (~60 cm)

nodes.label: Measuring Tools
nodes.description: Ruler, measuring tape, metre stick, odometer

nodes.label: Word Problems
nodes.description: Adding, subtracting, and comparing lengths in real-life situations

nodes.label: Adding Lengths
nodes.description: Convert to same unit, then add: 2 m 30 cm + 1 m 50 cm = 3 m 80 cm

nodes.label: Subtracting Lengths
nodes.description: Convert to same unit, then subtract: 5 m 40 cm - 2 m 60 cm = 2 m 80 cm
